title: Add a `systemd-` prefix to the name of pod's infra container created by Quadlet as well
body:
### Feature request description

Containers and pods created by Quadlet have a `systemd-` prefix in their names to avoid conflicts with user-managed containers. However, the pod's infra container does not follow this naming convention. I propose that we can use a `systemd-` prefixed name by default for pod's infra container created by Quadlet.

### Suggest potential solution

For example, a pod `systemd-mypod` can set `systemd-mypod-infra` as the name of its infra container.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

No

### Additional context

None

comments.body:
> Care to open a PR?

OK. I'm going to work on it.
